title: The Top 7 Stocks to Watch in 2023
text: A bull-bear battle is starting to materialize in the stock market, and I believe that the struggle will intensify in early 2023. Bears believe that we're heading for a steep recession and a horrible macro environment for stocks, and many of them are looking for unprofitable growth equities to short.

title: 5 Sleep-at-Night Microchip Stocks With Growing Passive Income
text: These dividend-paying companies are well positioned in the more resilient parts of the chip market.

title: Why Chip Stocks Taiwan Semi, Qualcomm, NXP, and Marvell All Fell Today
text: Weak guidance and layoffs from Micron sent the chip sector spiraling.

title: Semiconductor Stocks Are On the Rise: 3 Companies to Watch Right Now
text: Chip stocks are showing signs of life again, and these three names are especially promising.

title: NXP Expands Industry's Broadest Matter Portfolio with New, Secure Wireless MCUs
text: EINDHOVEN, The Netherlands, Dec. 14, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ: NXPI) today announced new devices designed to simplify the development of IoT and industrial IoT solutions. Adding to NXP's expanding portfolio of end-to-end Matter solutions, the RW612 and the K32W148 devices combine advanced edge processing capabilities with integrated security to streamline development, simplify designs and reduce costs for Matter-enabled smart home devices.

title: 7 Top Tech Stocks to Buy for the Coming Bull Market
text: As the market continues to show signs of life, there's an opportunity to seek out tech stocks to buy. This year conventional wisdom swung from believing the world was going to take a huge hit to believing that nearly all stocks were wonderful.
